stories.title: AUSL Play-in TONIGHT — Bandits vs. Cascade, 9 PM ET ESPN
stories.angle: Game day is here. No. 2 Chicago Bandits (16-9) vs. No. 3 Portland Cascade (14-11) tonight at 9 PM ET on ESPN at Davis Diamond, College Station, TX. Lexi Kilfoyl (6-0) vs. Megan Grant (10 HR, 17-game on-base streak). Portland already beat the Bandits 5-4 on July 12 (snapped their 9-game streak). The winner faces Utah Talons in the Championship Series starting Saturday July 25, Game 1 on ABC.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Game day at Davis Diamond.

No. 2 Chicago Bandits (16-9) vs. No. 3 Portland Cascade (14-11).

Tonight. 9 PM ET on ESPN.

Cascade already beat the Bandits 5-4 this season — ending Chicago's 9-game win streak. Same teams. Different stakes. #AUSL #softball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Megan Grant enters tonight with 10 home runs and a 17-game on-base streak — the longest active streak in the AUSL.

Lexi Kilfoyl enters 6-0.

One of them ends the night with a loss for the first time. #AUSL #softball

article.headline: Bandits vs. Cascade: Tonight at Davis Diamond. Here's What You Need to Know.

stories.title: PGF Nationals — Championship Weekend Preview
stories.angle: PGF Nationals bracket play closes out today — championships are this Saturday July 25. The 18U Premier Championship airs on ESPNU at 3 PM ET; the 16U Premier Championship is on ESPN+ at 11:30 AM ET. Plus High School All-American Games Saturday. September 1 is 39 days away — the window when D1 coaches can contact Class of 2028 recruits for the first time.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
PGF Nationals championships are Saturday.

18U Premier on ESPNU. 16U Premier on ESPN+.

September 1 — when D1 coaches can contact the Class of 2028 for the first time — is 39 days away.

Every bracket win this week is an audition. #PGFNationals #softball

article.headline: PGF Nationals Championship Weekend Is Saturday. The September 1 Clock Says 39 Days.

stories.title: Megan Grant HR Watch — Can She Break Brady's Record Tonight?
stories.angle: Maya Brady set the AUSL single-season HR record at 11 in the Spark's elimination game Tuesday. Megan Grant — Brady's former UCLA teammate — has 10 HRs and enters tonight's play-in active. She needs 2 more HRs in one game to tie the record. She is also on a 17-game on-base streak, the longest active streak in the AUSL this season. If Cascade advances, Grant gets Championship Series games too.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Maya Brady set the AUSL home run record at 11 on Tuesday — in the Spark's elimination loss.

Megan Grant has 10. Her Portland Cascade plays tonight.

She needs 2 HRs in one game to tie it. She's on a 17-game on-base streak. #AUSL #softball

stories.title: Lexi Kilfoyl vs. Portland Cascade — The Pitching Matchup
stories.angle: Lexi Kilfoyl is 6-0 this season. She held Portland Cascade opponents in check through the regular season but the Cascade beat her Bandits 5-4 on July 12. Tonight is the biggest start of Kilfoyl's professional career. Her ability to limit Megan Grant and Sierra Sacco-Ferrie is the key variable in whether Chicago advances.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Lexi Kilfoyl is 6-0 this season.

The last time she matched up against Portland Cascade, the Bandits lost 5-4.

Tonight at 9 PM ET on ESPN, she gets the rematch — with a championship bid on the line. #AUSL #softball

article.headline: Lexi Kilfoyl Is 6-0. The Last Time She Faced Portland, Her Team Lost.

stories.title: Utah Talons Championship Prep — Montana Fouts, ABC, Davis Diamond
stories.angle: The Utah Talons have had since July 20 to rest and prepare. Montana Fouts (7-4, 2.36 ERA, 63 K, AUSL K record of 12 in single game) is rested and ready. Game 1 of the Championship Series is Saturday July 25 at Noon ET on ABC — the first professional softball game ever on network television. Utah swept the Bandits to win the 2025 championship. Tonight they watch and wait.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Montana Fouts (7-4, 2.36 ERA, 12 K single-game record) has been resting since July 20.

Game 1 of the AUSL Championship is Saturday at Noon ET on ABC — the first professional softball game ever on network television.

The Talons are ready. #AUSL #softball

article.headline: The Talons Have Been Waiting Since July 20. Montana Fouts Is Ready. ABC Is Saturday.
